name: Shubham Kumar
my_twin: My twin would log every decision I make under uncertainty and check it against the same guardrails I'm building into Symbiote-X — a neuro-symbolic governance layer for drones and autonomous systems, where a hallucinated decision can cost lives. If the rails don't hold for the human running the system, they won't hold for the machine either. It would also track how I jump between abstraction layers — graph schema, dashboard, pitch deck — because that's where my errors actually hide.
